message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 20
  BoxPadding 10
  MessageAlign left
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor transparent
}

database Database as DB
participant ManageLogDemo as Demo
participant ManageLogReceiveFacade as ReceiveFacade
participant ManageLogReceiveProvider as ReceiveProvider
participant ManageLogCommon as Common
participant AnotherJavaProject as AnotherJavaProject
participant ManageLogUploadFacade as UploadFacade
participant AnotherProject as AnotherProject
participant ManageLogQueryProvider as QueryProvider
participant ManageLogQueryFacade as QueryFacade

box "rpc 上传日志" #transparent
  Demo -> ReceiveFacade : aspect 获取数据
  ReceiveFacade -> ReceiveProvider : rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
  ReceiveProvider -> Common : 使用工具类
  ReceiveProvider -> ReceiveProvider : 抓取配置
  ReceiveProvider -> DB : 落地数据
end box

box "自主使用 facade 上传日志" #transparent
  AnotherJavaProject -> ReceiveFacade : 自己组装数据，使用 facade 提供的策略上传
  ReceiveFacade -> UploadFacade : rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
  UploadFacade -> Common : 使用工具类
  UploadFacade -> UploadFacade : 抓取配置
  UploadFacade -> DB : 落地数据
end box

box "自主上传日志" #transparent
  AnotherProject -> UploadFacade : http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
  UploadFacade -> Common : 使用工具类
  UploadFacade -> UploadFacade : 抓取配置
  UploadFacade -> DB : 落地数据
end box

box "日志查询" #transparent
  Demo -> QueryProvider : 获取数据
  QueryProvider -> QueryFacade : rpc 提供
  QueryProvider <- QueryFacade : http 提供（默认）
end box

@enduml
```
